title: Ice Scream by Wish Team
description: This mod adds content from the game Ice Scream.
body:
![The mod requires Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cff1c1c0db5c83abc11212d69d45cc20e951b0d2.png)

This mod adds new structures, mobs, items and blocks from the Ice Scream game.

List items:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Slingshot and rock
2. Electro gun and energy charge
3. Yellow ice cream
4. Green ice cream
5. Pink ice cream
6. Rope

</details>

List mobs:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Rod
2. Mini rods:
   Operator
   Janitor
   Mechanic
   Prototype
3. Boris

List Blocks:

</details>

List blocks:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Red block
2. Red slab
3. Red stairs
4. White block
5. White slab
6. White stairs
7. Signal light
8. Waffle cone holder
9. Sink
10. Car door
11. Trash block
12. Cell
13. Bake
14. Iron door glass

</details>

List structures:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Rod van
2. J_home
3. Fabric Ice Scream
4. Cafe

</details>


<details>
<summary>Translation🌎</summary>

1.Ru
2.En
</details>
